description: Assemble the system prompt fed to Ollama. v0.1 uses the §6.6 baseline (PowerShell 7 only, no aliases, no Markdown, bounded operations, relative-time rules). v0.2+ extends the prompt with tool-registry awareness via §7.15.
notes: Keep the baseline rules in a `data` block so they are easy to diff and review.
steps: TDD: Output starts with the §6.6 baseline rules verbatim.
TDD: Output appends the prompt context JSON.
TDD: Output forbids Markdown fences and prose outside JSON.
TDD: Length stays under a configured ceiling (`context.maxContextBytes`).
Author `Private/Model/New-SystemPrompt.ps1` taking `(Context, Mode, Toolset = @())`. v0.1 ignores `Toolset`; v0.2 reuses this same function with the tool registry summary appended.
Tests assert the baseline string is present and the context JSON is embedded.
name: [mdl-03] Generation system prompt assembly
